title: make 종합 — 친구 수다 (DAY 22~24 표현 전부)

lines.en: Hey Jake! Long time no see. How's work going?
lines.ko: 제이크! 오랜만이야. 회사는 어때?

lines.en: Oh, it's rough. My boss makes me upload new video content every single week.
lines.ko: 아, 힘들어. 상사가 매주 새 영상 올리라고 시켜.

lines.en: Ugh, that sounds exhausting. At least you're eating well, right? Last time you said you were learning to cook.
lines.ko: 으, 지치겠다. 그래도 잘 챙겨 먹지? 저번에 요리 배운다며.

lines.en: Yeah, actually! I made myself go to a cooking class. I really didn't want to, but I'm glad I did.
lines.ko: 응! 억지로 요리 수업 갔거든. 진짜 가기 싫었는데 가길 잘했어.

lines.en: Nice. So can you actually make anything now?
lines.ko: 오, 그래서 이제 뭐 만들 줄 알아?

lines.en: Honestly? I can make you steamed galbi. My mom used to make us that every Sunday.
lines.ko: 솔직히? 갈비찜 해 줄 수 있어. 엄마가 일요일마다 해 주시곤 했거든.

lines.en: No way, that's my favorite. Okay, you've gotta make me some.
lines.ko: 진짜? 그거 내 최애인데. 나 좀 해 줘야 해.

lines.en: Deal. So what about you? How's the new relationship going?
lines.ko: 콜. 넌 어때? 새 연애는 잘돼 가?

lines.en: It's going really well. He's so thoughtful. Look, he made me this bracelet from string.
lines.ko: 완전 잘돼. 진짜 자상해. 봐, 끈으로 이 팔찌 만들어 줬어.

lines.en: Aw, that's cute. Wait, is he already making you wear matching outfits?
lines.ko: 오, 귀엽다. 잠깐, 벌써 커플룩 입게 하는 거야?

lines.en: He doesn't make me wear them. I want to.
lines.ko: 입으라고 시키는 거 아냐. 내가 입고 싶은 거지.

lines.en: You guys have been dating for like a week. Isn't that a little fast?
lines.ko: 만난 지 일주일밖에 안 됐잖아. 좀 빠르지 않아?

lines.en: Depends on the couple, I guess. We like it. He's just really easy to be with, and that alone makes him a good fit for me.
lines.ko: 커플마다 다르지 뭐. 우린 좋아. 같이 있기 편하고, 그거 하나만으로도 나한테 딱이야.

lines.en: That's what matters. You know, dating someone kind kind of makes you a better person.
lines.ko: 그게 중요하지. 착한 사람 만나면 나도 더 좋은 사람이 되는 거 같아.

lines.en: Totally. Having him around has made me way more patient.
lines.ko: 완전. 걔 덕분에 내가 훨씬 더 참을성 있어졌어.

lines.en: I get that. Anyway, I'm thinking of getting the new phone, the Pro model.
lines.ko: 이해돼. 아무튼 나 새 폰 살까 해, 프로 모델.

lines.en: It's more expensive, though.
lines.ko: 근데 더 비싸잖아.

lines.en: True, but the battery life makes it a better choice for me. I'm on my phone all day.
lines.ko: 맞아, 근데 배터리 때문에 나한텐 더 나은 선택이야. 하루 종일 폰 하거든.

lines.en: Fair enough. Oh, before I forget, you promised to make me galbi.
lines.ko: 하긴. 아 참, 나 갈비찜 해 주기로 한 거 잊지 마.

lines.en: I know, I know. Come over Saturday, and I'll make you something you won't forget.
lines.ko: 알아 알아. 토요일에 와, 잊지 못할 거 만들어 줄게.

lines.en: Can't wait. See you then!
lines.ko: 완전 기대돼. 그때 봐!
